name: Discord
description: Everything an agent needs to talk on Discord: the Discord channel (one-click connect via Eden's shared app and a slash command named after the agent) and the outbound send-message tool.
setup: This bundle installs the **Discord channel** and the **Discord send-message tool** together. After installing, open the agent's **Deployment** tab and click **Connect Discord** — pick your server, approve, and Eden registers a `/<agent-name>` slash command and routes interactions to the agent automatically.
